0.40  Implements the approved plan — Only 2 of 5 tests fully meet plan spec: TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA omits Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions; TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported) not TierGeneric; TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd; TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored relies on nil-return rather than asserting maintainability!=0.95
1.00  Minimal and scoped — Diff touches only internal/engine/scorer_test.go — the single target file from the plan — with zero unrelated churn
0.85  No test-gaming / faking — No tests deleted or weakened; no hard-coded expected values; DefaultsNotInjected uses wrong language but not to game a pass; AggregateSkipsUnsupported honestly Skip'd with TODO(#25)
0.95  Safe to advance — Tests-only change with no production code modified; no doc-comment/code mismatch; zero correctness or regression risk from adding test functions
0.92  Judge confidence — at or above the confidence bar

Reviewer independently re-ran the project verification (go build -o build/bin/certify ./cmd/certify/ && go test ./... -count=1): GREEN

Reviewer:
- TestScore_UnsupportedLanguage_ReturnsNA missing plan-required Grade=='N/A' and Unsupported==true assertions — only checks nil scores
- TestScore_DefaultsNotInjected uses 'go' (supported language) instead of TierGeneric unit as plan explicitly requires, weakening the guard against old-default injection
- TestScore_AggregateSkipsUnsupported is t.Skip'd — plan requirement #5 entirely unimplemented
- TestScore_UnmeasuredComplexity_NotScored relies on TierGeneric nil-return shortcut rather than specifically asserting maintainability dimension is NOT 0.95 as plan mandates
